title: Operation of a Basic Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU)
description: A flowchart showing how a simple ALU selects and performs an operation based on an opcode and inputs, then outputs the result.
relationships: The Opcode is decoded by the ALU Control Logic to select the operation
Input A and B are routed to both the Adder/Subtractor and Logic Unit circuits
The Control Logic uses a multiplexer to choose the correct result from the available circuits
The selected result is sent to Output Y
The Status Flags are set based on the characteristics of the result (e.g., Zero flag set if result is 0)
